'''âk-v-j''' ('''kavaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kurvey|kurvey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kurvey|kurvey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kavaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kavajithi|kavajithi]] || [[word:kavajiji|kavajiji]] || [[word:kavajishi|kavajishi]] || [[word:kavaji|kavaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavajuthuth|kavajuthuth]] || [[word:kavajujuj|kavajujuj]] || [[word:kavajushush|kavajushush]] || [[word:kavaj|kavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavajuthu|kavajuthu]] || [[word:kavajuju|kavajuju]] || [[word:kavajushu|kavajushu]] || [[word:kavaju|kavaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavajufuth|kavajufuth]] || [[word:kavajufuj|kavajufuj]] || [[word:kavajufush|kavajufush]] || [[word:kavajuf|kavajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kavajethe|kavajethe]] || [[word:kavajeje|kavajeje]] || [[word:kavajeshe|kavajeshe]] || [[word:kavaje|kavaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavajothoth|kavajothoth]] || [[word:kavajojoj|kavajojoj]] || [[word:kavajoshosh|kavajoshosh]] || [[word:kavaj|kavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavajotho|kavajotho]] || [[word:kavajojo|kavajojo]] || [[word:kavajosho|kavajosho]] || [[word:kavajo|kavajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavajofoth|kavajofoth]] || [[word:kavajofoj|kavajofoj]] || [[word:kavajofosh|kavajofosh]] || [[word:kavajof|kavajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kavajĂŠthĂŠ|kavajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kavajĂŠjĂŠ|kavajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kavajĂŠshĂŠ|kavajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kavajĂŠ|kavajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavajathath|kavajathath]] || [[word:kavajajaj|kavajajaj]] || [[word:kavajashash|kavajashash]] || [[word:kavaj|kavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavajatha|kavajatha]] || [[word:kavajaja|kavajaja]] || [[word:kavajasha|kavajasha]] || [[word:kavaja|kavaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavajafath|kavajafath]] || [[word:kavajafaj|kavajafaj]] || [[word:kavajafash|kavajafash]] || [[word:kavajaf|kavajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kavajasha|kavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokavajasha|gokavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikavajasha|gokikavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kavajnĂŒsha|kavajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokavajnknĂŒsha|gokavajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikavajnĂŒsha|gokikavajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kavajshĂ«sha|kavajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokavajnkshĂ«sha|gokavajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikavajshĂ«sha|gokikavajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kavajrosha|kavajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokavajnkrosha|gokavajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikavajrosha|gokikavajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kavajmusha|kavajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokavajnkmusha|gokavajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavajmusha|gokikavajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kavajsherasha|kavajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokavajnksherasha|gokavajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikavajsherasha|gokikavajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kavajngasha|kavajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokavajnkngasha|gokavajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikavajngasha|gokikavajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kavajyasha|kavajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokavajnkyasha|gokavajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikavajyasha|gokikavajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kavajyamasha|kavajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokavajnkyamasha|gokavajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikavajyamasha|gokikavajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kavajnĂŒshĂ«sha|kavajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokavajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokavajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikavajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikavajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kavajnĂŒrosha|kavajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokavajnknĂŒrosha|gokavajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikavajnĂŒrosha|gokikavajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavajnĂŒmusha|kavajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokavajnknĂŒmusha|gokavajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavajnĂŒmusha|gokikavajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kavajshĂ«nĂŒsha|kavajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokavajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokavajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikavajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikavajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kavajshĂ«rosha|kavajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokavajnkshĂ«rosha|gokavajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikavajshĂ«rosha|gokikavajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavajshĂ«musha|kavajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokavajnkshĂ«musha|gokavajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavajshĂ«musha|gokikavajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kavajronĂŒsha|kavajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokavajnkronĂŒsha|gokavajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikavajronĂŒsha|gokikavajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kavajroshĂ«sha|kavajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokavajnkroshĂ«sha|gokavajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikavajroshĂ«sha|gokikavajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kavajromusha|kavajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokavajnkromusha|gokavajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikavajromusha|gokikavajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kavajmunĂŒsha|kavajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokavajnkmunĂŒsha|gokavajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikavajmunĂŒsha|gokikavajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kavajmushĂ«sha|kavajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokavajnkmushĂ«sha|gokavajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikavajmushĂ«sha|gokikavajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kavajmurosha|kavajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokavajnkmurosha|gokavajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikavajmurosha|gokikavajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kavaj|kavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠvĂŠj|kĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokavaj|hokavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠvĂŠj|hokĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokavaj|hohokavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠvĂŠj|hohokĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkavaj|nĂŒkavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŒkĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkavaj|nĂŒnĂŒkavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkavaj|nĂŻkavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŻkĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkavaj|nĂŻnĂŻkavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠvĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukavaj|lukavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠvĂŠj|lukĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukavaj|lulukavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠvĂŠj|lulukĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likavaj|likavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠvĂŠj|likĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikavaj|lilikavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠvĂŠj|lilikĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokavaj|kokavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠvĂŠj|kokĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokavaj|kokokavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠvĂŠj|kokokĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekavaj|kekavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠvĂŠj|kekĂŠvĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekavaj|kekekavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠvĂŠj|kekekĂŠvĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
